page: Amazon Web Services r8idn.metal-48xl is a bare-metal, memory-optimized server instance featuring the x86_64 architecture. It is powered by Intel processors with 96 physical cores and 192 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The system provides 1536.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance includes 11400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, configured as instance store volumes. For network connectivity, the server delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. It is optimized for both network throughput and Elastic Block Store performance, facilitating high-speed data transfers and low-latency storage operations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the bare-metal configuration eliminates virtualization overhead, maximizing the utility of the hardware resources. The high density of memory and local NVMe storage represents a significant resource allocation, which carries a higher absolute operational cost compared to standard virtualized instances. The absence of dedicated GPU hardware limits its applicability for accelerated machine learning training workloads.

The hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive applications, large-scale databases, real-time analytics, and enterprise-grade workloads that require direct access to physical hardware resources. It is also suitable for high-throughput data processing pipelines and large-scale in-memory database deployments.
description: Amazon Web Services r8idn.metal-48xl is a bare-metal, memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 192 vCPUs across 96 physical Intel cores operating at 3.9 GHz, paired with 1536.0 GB of system memory. The hardware configuration includes 11400 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. Designed for bare-metal performance, this instance eliminates virtualization overhead to maximize resource utilization. While the high density of memory and storage offers significant capacity, the lack of GPU acceleration limits its use in deep learning workloads. This server is structured for memory-intensive applications, large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores, and high-throughput data processing workloads requiring direct hardware access.

tagline: A bare-metal, memory-optimized platform featuring high-capacity local NVMe storage and high-speed networking for demanding enterprise database workloads.
